button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or ((effect_status == 'direct_manager_review' and double_approval) or (effect_status != 'direct_manager_review' and effect_status != 'upper_manager_review')))

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or (supervision_type not in ['direct', 'indirect'] or effect_status in ['draft', 'applied', 'archived', 'rejected']))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 19px; font-weight: bold;

div.invisible: (weekly_vacation_work_permit or (is_weekly_effect or (not is_period or (periodic_effect or weekly_day_off_integer >= 1))))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;

div.invisible: (weekly_vacation_work_permit or (periodic_effect or (weekly_effect or (not is_weekly_effect or weekly_day_off_integer >= 1))))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or ((effect_status == 'direct_manager_review' and double_approval) or (effect_status != 'direct_manager_review' and effect_status != 'upper_manager_review')))

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or (supervision_type not in ['direct', 'indirect'] or effect_status in ['draft', 'applied', 'archived', 'rejected']))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 19px; font-weight: bold;

div.invisible: (weekly_vacation_work_permit or (is_weekly_effect or (not is_period or (periodic_effect or weekly_day_off_integer >= 1))))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;

div.invisible: (weekly_vacation_work_permit or (periodic_effect or (weekly_effect or (not is_weekly_effect or weekly_day_off_integer >= 1))))

label.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;
width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold;

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or ((effect_status == 'direct_manager_review' and double_approval) or (effect_status != 'direct_manager_review' and effect_status != 'upper_manager_review')))

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or (supervision_type not in ['direct', 'indirect'] or effect_status in ['draft', 'applied', 'archived', 'rejected']))

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or ((effect_status == 'direct_manager_review' and double_approval) or (effect_status != 'direct_manager_review' and effect_status != 'upper_manager_review')))

button.name: btn_change_status
button.invisible: (is_hr_manager or (supervision_type not in ['direct', 'indirect'] or effect_status in ['draft', 'applied', 'archived', 'rejected']))
